testcase.classname: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow
testcase.name: User adds multiple products to cart - #1.1

testcase.system-out: Given User navigate to chrome browser.......................................passed When I navigate to Home page of the Amazon web application..................passed And Go to the Hello,Sign in option..........................................passed And Click on the Sign in link...............................................passed Then User move to the Login page............................................passed Given User enters the valid phone number "8630718216" into the fieldbox.....failed And click on the Continue button............................................skipped And Enter the valid password "Kaushik21#" into password field...............skipped And Click on the Sign In button.............................................skipped Then user should get successfully logged in.................................skipped When User clicks in the search field box....................................skipped And User enters the product name "Thermometer"..............................skipped And Clicks on the search icon button........................................skipped Then All "Thermometer" results should be shown on the page..................skipped And The user selects a "Thermometer" product................................skipped Then The user navigates to the product details page.........................skipped When User clicks on the Add to cart button..................................skipped Then User clicks on the No Thanks button....................................skipped And Product should add into the cart........................................skipped And User clicks on the Go to Cart button....................................skipped Then The user verifies product "Thermometer" is present in cart.............skipped And The user verifies cart is not empty.....................................skipped When User clicks on Proceed to Buy button...................................skipped Then User should navigate to the checkout page..............................skipped And User selects delivery address...........................................skipped Then User should be redirected to payment page..............................skipped And User selects the payment method.........................................skipped
